string.text: {!}^^{s3}^Price = {reg4} (Hindostani average {reg6})^Capital: {reg11} {s4}^Base {reg1}/modified by raw material {reg2}/modified by prosperity {reg3}^(Hindostani average production, base {reg5}, total {reg12}).^Consumed {reg7}/used as raw material {reg8}/modified total {reg9}^(Hindostani consumption, base: {reg10}, total: {reg13}){s1}^
You will not be disappointed {sir/madam}. You will not find better warriors in all Hindostan.
Indeed? Well, perhaps your reputation is misleading. Good day, {my lord/my lady} - - I go to see if another ruler in Hindostan is more appreciative of my talents.
Well done, {?PLAYER.GENDER}madam{?}sir{\?}. Keep the money and wine coming our way, and there's no foe in Hindostan you need fear.[ib:convo_approving]
You will not be dissapointed {?PLAYER.GENDER}madam{?}sir{\?}. You will not find better warriors in all Hindostan.[ib:convo_approving]
